steps.t: Thane Mágla is sitting at his table. Mágla has asked you to speak with him.
The mead can be found on the table. Mágla has asked you to share a drink with him.
Mágla can be found at the table. Mágla sees no hope for Rohan. You should disagree with him.
Mágla can be found at the table. Mágla sees no hope for Rohan. You should tell him of your journeys in the Eastemnet.
Mágla can be found at the table. Mágla is beginning to believe that hope remains. You should challenge him.
Mágla can be found in the Mead Hall. You should travel outside to confront the White Hand with Mágla.
Mágla is in Middlemead. You should fight through Middlemead with Mágla.
Thane Mágla can be found outside the Mead Hall of Middlemead. You have escaped the White Hand forces and made your way to the horses. You should speak…
